description: The Talon community command set includes app-specific command files in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\community\apps\. Update C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\community\apps\notepad\notepad.talon with four additional voice commands appended to the end: 'word wrap toggle' (key(alt-o), sleep(200ms), key(w)), 'status bar toggle' (key(alt-o), sleep(200ms), key(s)), 'time date' (key(f5)), and 'select everything' (key(ctrl-a)).
